name: Yellow Chilli Marinade
steps: Blitz Chilies separately until very smooth consistency in thermo mix.
Blitz together the rest of ingredients until smooth consistency.
Add all together and blitz again.
Add oil slowly into the mix while thermo mix on 3 speed.
After full amount of oil inside the sauce, blitz on full speed for 5 more minutes.
After it's ready, cool down and keep refrigerated.
